mapper.update: UPDATE wf_ticket SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName}, status = #{toStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND assignee_id IS NULL AND status = #{fromStatus}

UPDATE wf_ticket SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName}, status = #{targetStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND assignee_id IS NULL
